resources.string: Не вдалося приєднатися до хосту. Перевірте URL-адресу або порт на наявність помилок
Не рекомендується використовувати HTTP-протокол, якщо ви не тестуєте в локальній мережі
Отримано неправильний JSON. Відповідь сервера не вдала
Введіть URL-адресу без http або https. Наприклад: codeberg.org
Неможливо отримати доступ до мережі, будь ласка, перевірте підключення до Інтернету
No changes found for this file
Ім\'я сховища містить зарезервовані ключові слова
Репозиторій із такою назвою вже існує в обраного власника
Гілка за замовчуванням не повинна бути порожньою
Цю функцію буде видалено у майбутньому
Видавець не надає примітки до випуску.
Are you sure you want to delete milestone %1$s?
You are about to close milestone %1$s. Press Close to continue.
This action will reopen milestone %1$s. Press Open to continue.
Ви впевнені, що хочете видалити будь-які довірені вручну сертифікати чи імена хостів? \n\nВи також вийдете з системи.
Maximum amount of time to wait for a server response.
Буде видалено всі дані кешу, включаючи файли та зображення.\n\nПродовжити видалення?
Головний екран, звіти про збої, користувацькі вкладки
Виберіть, який екран має завантажуватися, якщо додаток не може обробляти зовнішні посилання. Він автоматично перенаправить вас.
Вибір екрана обробника посилань за замовчуванням
Увімкнення цієї функції показуватиме мітки з текстом у списках завдань та пріоритетів, за замовчуванням це кольорові крапки
An error occurred while creating a data backup
This action will backup your accounts, settings, notes, and data related to repositories.\n\nClick the Backup button to download the backup file.

You are about to restore from a GitNex-generated backup file. This will restore user accounts, settings, notes, and data related to repositories.

Please note this action will overwrite the current database data. Proceed with caution.

Click Restore to start the process.
An error occurred while restoring from the backup file.
You are about to restore from a GitNex-generated backup file. This will restore user accounts, settings, notes, and data related to repositories.\n\nClick Restore to start the process.
Set Email and Language as Private
You can set your email and language to private to hide them on your profile screen
You can enable this option to hide your email in the app home dashboard screen
Are you sure you want to delete label %1$s?
It seems that the Access Token is revoked OR you are not allowed to see these contents.\n\nIn case of revoked Token, please update the account.
Ви дійсно бажаєте видалити цю мітку?
Members of this team do not have any permissions.
Members of this team can view team repositories.
Members of this team can view and push to team repositories.
Team members can push to and pull from team repositories and add collaborators to them.
Members of this team have owner permissions.
Ви хочете додати цього користувача в команду?
Ви хочете видалити цього користувача з команди?
Repository added to the team successfully
Repository removed from the team successfully
Учасники можуть переглядати та клонувати репозиторії команди
Учасники можуть читати і виконувати push в репозиторії команди
Members can pull from and push to team repositories and add collaborators to them
Назва команди має містити лише букви, цифри, дефіс (-), підкреслення (_) та крапку (.)
Ви хочете вилучити користувача з репозиторія?
This action will permanently delete email %s from your account.
Invalid SSH key or SSH key already exists
Are you sure you want to delete %1$s SSH key?
Do you really want to delete this release?
Invalid branch name, may only contain a–z, 0–9, hyphens (-), underscores (_), forward slashes (/), and periods (.)
Поля імені файлу, вмісту та повідомлення коміту є обов\'язковими
Leave blank to push to the default branch
Назва нової гілки не може бути пустою, якщо не обрано поточну гілку
Branch name and ref are required
Cannot create branch: Repository is archived or a mirror
Вибачте, цей файл неможливо переглянути, оскільки API повернув помилку
Files of this type cannot be edited
Щось пішло не так. Будь ласка, спробуйте знову
This request needs higher version than the one installed. Please upgrade your instance to the latest version.
У вас немає дозволу на виконання цієї дії.
На даний момент ми не можемо зв\'язатися з сервером, будь ласка, перевірте статус вашого сервера і спробуйте ще раз
Unsupported old version(%1$s) of the server detected. Please update to latest stable version. If you continue, some features may not work.
New server version detected! Please UPDATE GitNex!
Екземпляр повернув помилку - не авторизовано. Перевірте облікові дані та спробуйте знову
Об\'єднання не відбудеться, якщо ви не маєте дозволу приймати цей запит на злиття.
Disabled Merge button means that there are conflicts OR other things to fix before Merge
This branch belongs to a forked repository
Запит на злиття було успішно об\'єднано
Запит на злиття недоступний для об\'єднання
Not allowed to merge [Reason: Does not have enough approvals]
Allow maintainers to edit this pr
This file type/size is not supported in file viewer. You can download it from the menu.
File is set for deletion by branch %1$s
Сертифікат сервера не підписано відомим центром сертифікації
Сервер не може автентифікуватись як \"%s\". Сертифікат дійсний тільки для:

It is encouraged to open an issue at the project repository with how to reproduce this bug. It is easier to debug and fix the problem that way.

Tap the OK button to send the crash report by email instead. Additional content could be added in the email.
Thank you!

Due to some major changes regarding the internal functioning of the app, we require you to login again. These changes allow us to make the app more flexible in the future.\n\nThank you for your patience and sorry for the inconvenience.
Do you want to reset counter for repository %s?
This will reset all the counters for this account repositories.
If you like GitNex you can give it a thumbs up
App version, build, user instance version
Backup and restore accounts, settings and more
Backup accounts, settings, notes and more
Restore accounts, settings, notes and more
This repo is archived. You can view files, but cannot push or open issues/pull-requests.
Are you sure you want to remove this account from the app?\n\nThis will remove all the data related to this account on the app only.
Account already exists in the app
Choose a minutely delay in which GitNex tries to poll new notifications
Successfully marked all notifications as read
This is the main notification channel of GitNex.
To receive notifications, you must enable notifications for GitNex. Tap Open to access your phone settings and enable notifications.
Change name, description, visibility and features
Be careful, this operation CANNOT be undone!

Things to know before deletion:

- This operation CANNOT be undone.
- This operation will permanently delete the repository including code, issues, comments, wiki data and collaborator settings.
Type the repository name to confirm
Transfer this repository to a user or to an organization for which you have administrator rights

Things to know before transfer:

- You will lose access to the repository if you transfer it to an individual user.
- You will keep access to the repository if you transfer it to an organization that you (co-)own.

Enter the repository name as confirmation
There is a problem with the owner name. Make sure that the new owner exists
These branches are equal. There is no need to create a pull request
A pull request between these branches already exists
It seems that the account for URI %1$s does not exist in the app. You can add one by tapping on the Add New Account button.

GitNex cannot handle the requested resource. You can open an issue in the project repository for improvement, providing details of the work. Launch the default screen from the buttons below; it can be changed in settings.
No biometric features available on this device
Indicates the progress of ongoing downloads
The pull request conflicts with the base branch. Please resolve the conflicts and try again.
Do you really want to delete this tag?
A tag attached to a release cannot be deleted directly
No application was found to open this link. SSH URLs and URLs with prefixes other than http:// or https:// are not supported by most browsers
- Adopt will add repository %1$s to organization/user %2$s.\n- Delete will remove it from the system.
Do you really want to delete %s?
Page name and page content can\'t be empty
A wiki page with this title already exists
Do you really want to delete this note?
This will delete all of your notes. This action cannot be undone.
%1$s added this to a deleted milestone %2$s
%1$s referenced this pull request from a <font color=\'%2$d\'>%3$s</font> %4$s
%1$s locked as %2$s and limited conversation to collaborators %3$s
%1$s modified the due date to %2$s from %3$s %4$s
%1$s referenced this issue from a <font color=\'%2$d\'>%3$s</font> %4$s
This status has no linked target URL.
An issue was created but cannot process attachments at this time. Check the server logs for more details.
File type .%s may not be supported by the server
Name must contain only alphanumeric characters or underscores
Variables will be passed to certain actions and cannot be read otherwise.
Case-insensitive, alphanumeric characters or underscores only, cannot start with GITEA_ or GITHUB_
Input any content. Whitespace at the start and end will be omitted.

If your Gitea/Forgejo is behind a reverse proxy with HTTP Basic Authentication, enter the credentials here.\n\nGitNex sends these in the \'X-Proxy-Auth: Basic …\' header. Administrators needs to configure the proxy to read from this header.
Please provide both username and password or leave both empty
Show a confirmation dialog before opening external links in Markdown rendered contents
There is no data to display at the moment.
View the repositories you visit most often
Create and manage personal notes, and attach them to issues
Explore public repositories, issues, organizations, and users
Manage all system accounts and users
View and execute system scheduled maintenance tasks
Search and claim repositories found on disk
View global repository and LFS settings
Email, username, and password are required
This is a preview of your new profile picture
Repository admin can change team access
Search within your repositories with filters for more precise results
You cannot add yourself as a reviewer
Are you sure you want to delete this variable? This action cannot be undone.
A file with this name already exists
This will stage the file for deletion in the selected branch.
Binary file - will be uploaded as-is
This file is large and may take time to upload
Create pull request with this branch
Browse and manage all your pull requests with search and filters
Unable to detect server version automatically. Please enter the version manually in the format shown below.
Invalid version format. Please use format like 1.26.1
